sections.snippet: Drop down dew from above, you heavens, and let the clouds rain down the Just One; Let the earth be opened and bring forth a Savior.
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice

sections.snippet: Lord, make us turn to you; let us see your face and we shall be saved.
sections.author: Owen Alstott

sections.snippet: Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to be according to your word.
sections.author: Sprit & Psalm 2025

sections.title: Christ, Shine in Our Lives
sections.snippet: When the darkness surrounds us and troubles our hearts, and we cry out for justice and peace; when the proud and the mighty bring terror and fear, and burden the hearts of the meek; when judgment and hate overwhelm us, and prejudice reigns in the night: Light of Christ, shine in our lives.
sections.author: Chris Muglia

sections.snippet: Behold, a Virgin shall conceive and bear a son; and his name will be called Emmanuel.
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice

sections.title: Mary Sing with Joyful Heart (Ave Maria)
sections.snippet: Mary, sing with joyful heart: “You shall bear Emmanuel!” Virgin Mother, full of grace, pray for us to God, your Son!
sections.author: Steve Angrisano/James Quinn SJ

sections.title: Breath of Heaven (Mary's Song)
sections.snippet: I have travelled many moonless nights. Cold and weary with a babe inside. And I wonder what I've done. Holy Father, You have come and chosen me now to carry Your Son
sections.author: Amy Grant

sections.title: You Are The Light
sections.snippet: Light of the world in the cover of the night. Glorious star in the shadows you are shining. Hope for the lost, salvation for the sinner. You conquered the cross with the brightness of your rising!
sections.author: Josh Blakesley

sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
